metrics.name: Pass to assist per 90
metrics.description: Passes directly leading to a goal assist per 90 minutes (link play involvement proxy)

metrics.name: Key passes per 90
metrics.description: Passes leading directly to a shot per 90 minutes (proxy for through passes)

metrics.name: Assists per 90
metrics.description: Assists per 90 minutes (proxy for expected assists)

metrics.name: Passes to final third per 90
metrics.description: Accurate passes into the final third per 90 minutes

metrics.name: Long passes per 90
metrics.description: Long pass attempts per 90 minutes (proxy for progressive distribution range)

metrics.name: Accurate long passes, %
metrics.description: Accuracy percentage of long passes (proxy for accurate progressive distribution)

metrics.name: Goals per 90
metrics.description: Goals scored per 90 minutes (proxy for expected goals)

metrics.name: Total duels won, %
metrics.description: Percentage of all duels won (proxy for pressing duel success rate)

core_10_model.scoring_method: Each metric is computed from Sofascore raw stats per the computation formula, then converted to percentile (0-100). For inverse metrics (higher_is_better: false), the inverted percentile is used. Category score = average percentile of metrics in that category. Final score = sum(category_score * category_weight).
